problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
